title: clitoria javitensis var. longiloba
intro: Clitoria javitensis var. longiloba, also known as Butterfly Pea, is a plant species that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae) and is native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Clitoria javitensis var. longiloba include improved cardiovascular health, reduced inflammation, and enhanced cognitive function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and risks.
